## Meeting Purpose

[Bi-weekly all-hands meeting to welcome new hires, share company updates, and demo new product features.](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [14 new hires introduced across various roles and locations](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Strong pipeline with 58 deals; aiming for 3 kickoffs/week by early May](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [New high-profile clients signed, including Webflow and GCAI](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Product team demoed "Atlas," a new content production tool in development](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)

## Topics

### New Hire Introductions

  - [14 new team members introduced themselves, spanning roles in finance, content, tech recruiting, and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Diverse locations including Berlin, Virginia, Buenos Aires, California, New York, Nigeria, Brazil, Charlotte, Vancouver, Boise, Bay Area, and Cape Town](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [First freelancer (Timmy) transitioned to full-time](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Company Updates

  - [Becerra and Prateek received promotions](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [Marcel posted vision/strategy docs in Notion for context](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating a culture of ownership and rewarding hard work](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)

### Pipeline and New Logos

  - [58 deals in pipeline; aiming for 3 kickoffs/week by early May](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [New clients signed: Ustructure, Shape AI, GCAI, Fossil, Webflow, Vapi](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Over $1 million in new ARR from recent signings](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Focus on retaining and growing existing customers](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)

### Product Demo: Atlas

  - [New product in development to replace AirOps spreadsheet](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Features include strategy area, content production, and performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [Customizable workflow pipelines with AI-assisted editing and chat interfaces](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Ability to run multiple tasks simultaneously or step-by-step](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Integration with various APIs and future content vault feature](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue ramping up capacity for increased kickoffs](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Finalize and announce Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [Develop Atlas product, aiming for initial usable version by end of month](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Team members to share feedback on new product in EPD support channel](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1808.0)
  - [Next bi-weekly all-hands meeting scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/wx_ypoEBaca37spcodyFD5NTQJbzAcbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)
